title: Bug Bytes #91 - The shortest domain, Weird Facebook authentication bypass & GitHub Actions secrets
payloads_or_poc: Forcing Firefox to Execute XSS Payloads during 302 Redirects

If you find an XSS but cannot execute it because the payload is reflected in the HTTP response Location header, it’s not useless. @QKaiser shows how browsers can be forced to not follow a 302 redirect, and execute the XS…
